Articulate that without their collaborative support, you feel increasingly trapped and unlovable, but also express your willingness to explore ways to build your own resilience and find validation through your actions. This approach aims to invite a constructive dialogue while gently encouraging the counselor to help you foster greater self-reliance, thus balancing your need for support with the goal of developing your emotional independence.
